title: Social Work Associate
description:
Social Work Associate will be working with the youths staying in an institutional facility, which focus on community rehabilitation. List of responsibilities, but not limited to:

Programme management

- Conduct needs assessment to develop suitable programmes, developing risk assessment and manage risks involved in programmes

- Plan for, lead and facilitate programmes

- Implement appropriate assessment tools to develop and evaluate group work outcomes

- Develop and plan group processes and specialised intervention strategies

- Facilitate, evaluate and review therapeutic group work sessions

Volunteer management

- Volunteer management and engagement.

- Sourcing for volunteer partners to value add to hostel programmes

Casework support

- Support case management, include preparing, and attending all necessary case-related appointments/meetings

- Develop / maintain good working relationship with stakeholders, including parents and schools

- Apply restorative practices including planning and facilitating a restorative circle and principles of trauma-informed care

Administrative

- Able to organize and upkeep documents

- Able to keep to administrative timelines


Technical competencies

  • Possess good engagement and facilitation skills;
  • Possess good knowledge and experiences with social work interventions, social policies and community engagement;
  • Possess strong communication and writing skills.

Core competencies

  • Resilience (Able to overcome adversity and emerge stronger);
  • Integrity (Guiding decisions with moral principles);
  • Serving (Willing to go the extra mile for others);
  • Excellence (Always expecting the best of self);
  • A good Team player (Able to value add ideas and ready to respect group decisions).

Preferred achievements

  • Diploma in Social Sciences with prior experience of mentoring and working with youths
  • Prior experience in working with youth-at-risk would be an advantage
  • Interested applicant may email your resume directly to careers@trybe.org

postedCompany.description:
TRYBE LIMITED


Established in 1995, Trybe is a social service agency that specialises in working with youth facing adversities. Our vision is "Every Youth a Success Story". We believe that all youth are able to reach the fullest of their potential to live successful lives. Thus, we are united by our mission - to journey with youth who face adversities to lead purposeful lives; inspiring them to impact others.


Trybe, an Institution of a Public Character (IPC), is a member of the National Council of Social Service (NCSS). Our corporate values are resilience, integrity, service, and excellence.


Trybe runs various youth programmes and manages the Singapore Boys’ Hostel (SBHL). We provide youth with guidance and offer support for their families and communities, creating a complete ecosystem of care from community-based outreach and interventions, to individual in-care and aftercare services.
postedCompany.name: TRYBE LIMITED

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
